description_long: This marble sculpture depicts a dynamic group of four classical figures arranged on a rectangular base. At the center, a bearded male figure, possibly a god or mythological character, holds a staff and gestures upward, while a seated female figure with flowing hair sits beside him, her posture relaxed and contemplative. Two cherubic children, one at the front and one at the rear, add a playful element to the composition, each engaged in their own activity. The figures are intricately detailed, with careful attention to anatomy, drapery, and facial expressions, evoking a sense of movement and interaction. The surface is smooth with subtle textural variations, and the entire piece is rendered in a uniform white stone. The base is flat and unadorned, serving as a stable platform for the figures above.
description: A detailed white marble sculpture featuring a bearded man, a seated woman, and two cherubic children in a dynamic, classical arrangement. The figures are intricately carved with lifelike detail and expressive poses.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bearded man holding a staff, the seated woman, and a child reclining at the base, with all figures facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bearded man's profile, his raised arm, and the side of the seated woman and child, revealing more of the base's texture.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view displaying the backs of the figures, the drapery details, and the arrangement of the children around the central adults.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear of the group, with the children more visible and the adults' backs and flowing garments prominently displayed.
attribute_subject_matter: mythological or allegorical human figures with children
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
